message:
Add transcript utility functions for How It Was Made page

- formatTime: Format ISO timestamps as localized time
- formatDuration: Format duration between two timestamps
- detectLanguage: Detect code language for syntax highlighting
- formatFilePath: Truncate long file paths for display
- formatBytes: Human-readable byte sizes
- estimateTokens: Rough token count estimation
- formatNumber: K/M suffix formatting

Closes jeffreysprompts.com-73l

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
